title: Mask Credit Card Numbers
description: Replace 16-digit credit card numbers in text with a masked version showing only the last 4 digits.
problem: Write mask_cards(text) that finds any 16-digit number (with or without spaces/dashes every 4 digits) and replaces it with '**** **** **** 1234' format, keeping the real last 4 digits.
starter_code:
import re

def mask_cards(text):
    # Find 16-digit card numbers (groups of 4, separated by space/dash/none)
    # Replace with **** **** **** <last4>
    return text
hint: Pattern: r'\b(\d{4})[ -]?(\d{4})[ -]?(\d{4})[ -]?(\d{4})\b'. In re.sub, build replacement using the last group.
